title: Amtech I9332 3 Piece mini pry bar Set
features: DURABLE: This mini pry bar set is made from heat treated hardened carbon steel, power coated satin black

MULTI-PURPOSE TOOL: It is ideal for a wide range of DIY tasks such as opening paint tins, getting into small gaps, levering open plastic housings, pulling pieces together before drilling or nailing, and lifting small tacks or nails out, etc.
SIZES: The set comes in the following sizes: small bar (135mm x 12mm), medium bar (185mm x 22mm), long bar (235mm x 40mm at its widest ends)
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: This mini pry bar set is made from heat treated, hardened carbon steel for durability.
